name: @pryzm/typology-pack-apartment
description: A.4.a (Phase A · Sprint 2) — Apartment typology pack BRIDGE.  Ships the C50-compliant TypologyManifest + minimal TypologyStageBundle so the new `runtime.typology.router.dispatch({ typologyId: 'apartment', ... })` path is callable end-to-end.  Full code migration of D-TGL / D-FLE / D-CE / D-LE / validators / cognition evaluators / command emitters from `@pryzm/ai-host` into per-stage handlers here ships in later A.4.b-A.4.x slices.
